reviews.review_title: Robin Hood has nothing on me...
reviews.review_description: This game is still being created but it is still a fun game to play now and can't wait for them to add more, add multiplayer and to finish the game. You can't miss at the price it was at when I got it. (free) I hope they continue to work on this game and get it finished.

I think it's very good. In addition, I would like you to add an online system, My imagination is standing on a tower and knocking down the opponent's enemies, so the team with the higher points wins. I think solo or trio would be fine. Also, since this is a game that uses a bow, please make the settings a little more detailed.
Targeting is so off that you can’t hit anything. Very frustrating
